subject: Add editorial subtitles to Community and Profile page headers
description: Design reference uses descriptive editorial headers (e.g. "A leaderboard that rewards momentum without losing warmth"). Add similar descriptive subtitles under our functional headers on Community and Profile pages to match the editorial tone of the reference.

changes: Added editorial subtitle to Community page header in CommunityPage.jsx:50-56 - serif tagline + revised body copy
Profile page already had editorial tone in trust panel heading - no changes needed
